name: Federally Authorized Practitioner Confidentiality Privilege

eligibility.description: Applies to tax advice given by CPAs, Enrolled Agents, or Enrolled Actuaries in noncriminal IRS or Federal court proceedings, provided the communication is not related to tax shelter promotion.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Extends the common law attorney-client privilege to tax advice communications between taxpayers and CPAs or Enrolled Agents in noncriminal matters.
